gaps.detectionLogic: I25.x, I21.x, I63.x, I70.x, Z95.x without any statin
gaps.name: ASCVD: Statin not prescribed

gaps.detectionLogic: I21.x within 12 mo not on atorva 40-80 or rosuva 20-40
gaps.name: Post-ACS: High-intensity statin gap

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD + LDL>=70 on max statin, no ezetimibe
gaps.name: LDL not at goal <70: add ezetimibe

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD + LDL>=70 on statin + ezetimibe
gaps.name: LDL still not at goal: PCSK9i/inclisiran

gaps.detectionLogic: Polyvascular or recurrent + LDL>=55 despite max

gaps.detectionLogic: Statin e-Rx with zero fills in pharmacy claims
gaps.name: Statin prescribed but not filled (primary non-adherence)

gaps.detectionLogic: Chronic statin with PDC<80% in past 12mo
gaps.name: Statin chronic adherence PDC<80%

gaps.detectionLogic: Documented statin intolerance + LDL elevated without bempedoic acid
gaps.name: Statin intolerance: bempedoic acid

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD without LDL in past 12 months
gaps.name: LDL not measured in secondary prevention (12mo)

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD without ever-measured Lp(a)
gaps.name: Lp(a) never measured in ASCVD

gaps.detectionLogic: PCSK9i prescribed + not filled due to PA/cost
gaps.name: PCSK9i prior auth gap / cost barrier

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD or FH suspected without ApoB
gaps.name: ApoB not measured for risk refinement

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD without hs-CRP
gaps.name: hs-CRP not measured (residual inflammatory risk)

gaps.detectionLogic: Age 40-75 + PREVENT risk>=7.5 without statin
gaps.name: Primary prevention statin gap (PREVENT risk>=7.5)

gaps.detectionLogic: E11.x age>=40 without statin
gaps.name: Diabetes primary prevention statin

gaps.detectionLogic: ASCVD + TG 150-499 + statin without icosapent
gaps.name: Icosapent ethyl eligible

gaps.detectionLogic: LDL>=190 without FH evaluation/genetic testing
gaps.name: Familial hypercholesterolemia screening (LDL>=190)

gaps.detectionLogic: Borderline/intermediate ASCVD risk without CAC score
gaps.name: CAC score for intermediate-risk primary prevention

gaps.detectionLogic: Premature CAD family history without CAC + risk recalibration
gaps.name: Polygenic risk score + CAC integration

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-ACS on clopidogrel without contraindication to pras/tica
gaps.name: Post-ACS DAPT: clopidogrel vs prasugrel/ticagrelor

gaps.detectionLogic: Prasugrel + stroke/TIA history
gaps.name: Prasugrel + prior stroke/TIA (SAFETY)

gaps.detectionLogic: PCI date vs P2Y12i duration appropriateness
gaps.name: Post-PCI DAPT duration review

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-PCI 1-3 mo + low ischemic risk without ticagrelor monotherapy eval
gaps.name: DAPT de-escalation post-PCI (TWILIGHT/TICO)

gaps.detectionLogic: AF+recent PCI on OAC+DAPT beyond 1-6 mo
gaps.name: Triple therapy AF+PCI: duration minimization (AUGUSTUS)

gaps.detectionLogic: Prasugrel in elderly/low-weight
gaps.name: Prasugrel age>75 or weight<60 (not recommended)

gaps.detectionLogic: PRECISE-DAPT>=25 on extended DAPT
gaps.name: High bleeding risk: DAPT shortening (PRECISE-DAPT>=25)

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-ACS without BB unless contraindicated
gaps.name: Post-ACS: beta-blocker gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-ACS + LVEF<40 or DM/CKD/HTN without ACEi/ARB
gaps.name: Post-ACS: ACEi/ARB gap

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-MI LVEF<=35 at >=40 days without ICD consideration
gaps.name: Post-MI: ICD evaluation at day 40

gaps.name: Post-ACS colchicine gap (LoDoCo2)

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-MI without SGLT2i even without diabetes
gaps.name: Post-MI SGLT2i gap (EMPACT-MI/DAPA-MI)

gaps.detectionLogic: Post-ACS + active smoker without cessation meds

gaps.detectionLogic: STEMI first medical contact to PCI >90 min
gaps.name: STEMI door-to-balloon >90 min

gaps.name: NSTEMI early invasive strategy (GRACE>=140)

gaps.name: STEMI transfer D2B >120 min

gaps.name: NSTEMI delayed strategy for GRACE<140: timing window

gaps.detectionLogic: CAD + PAD + carotid/cerebrovasc - intensification pattern
gaps.name: Polyvascular disease: intensified regimen

gaps.name: Polyvascular: COMPASS dual pathway

gaps.name: Complex PCI without IVUS/OCT guidance

gaps.name: Stent sizing by IVUS: underexpansion risk

gaps.name: LM disease: heart team review (SYNTAX II)

gaps.name: CTO PCI candidate: operator/center expertise match

gaps.name: Calcified lesion: rotational atherectomy/IVL consideration

gaps.name: Bifurcation PCI strategy: provisional vs 2-stent

gaps.name: Acute stent thrombosis: emergent repeat intervention

gaps.name: Subacute stent thrombosis: DAPT compliance review

gaps.detectionLogic: ISR without drug-coated balloon consideration

gaps.name: SCAI stage D: ECMO evaluation

gaps.detectionLogic: SBP<90 + tachycardia + near-shock state pattern without close monitoring
gaps.name: SCAI Stage B pre-shock identification

gaps.name: Post-MI SSRI consideration for depression (ENRICHD pattern)

gaps.name: Post-MI cardiac rehab referral + enrollment

gaps.name: ICD patient + drive/employment counseling

gaps.name: Post-ACS sexual activity counseling

gaps.detectionLogic: Imaging bridging + angina pattern without provocation + strategy
gaps.name: Myocardial bridging symptomatic: workup

gaps.name: Pre-op cardiac risk assessment not documented

gaps.name: Pre-op beta-blocker decision documentation

gaps.name: Post-PCI non-cardiac surgery timing

gaps.name: Post-arrest TTM with subsequent coronary angio
